name: error_type_negative_dry_run
description: Demonstrates error_type_is. Dry-run only because reliably forcing a specific error class (rate_limit, timeout, auth_failed, ...) in CI is brittle - the agent is healthy by default. To enable manually: revoke the agent's API key (or set a tiny rate-limit), re-run without --dry-run, and the scorer will assert TurnOutput.error_type matches the expected string.
